problem id: 1054486f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  00111000 -> 00000111
  11100100 -> 10011100
  00100111 -> 11100100
  00000001 -> 00100000
  00011011 -> 01100011
  01101110 -> 11001101
  01111001 -> 00101111
  00011010 -> 01000011
  01101000 -> 00001101
  11001001 -> 00111001

query: 11110100
predicted answer: 10011110
